text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've brought Mejiro Ardan to the infirmary, as
she's suffered an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I sincerely apologize for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That said, given my medical history, I know from
experience that this injury is of no concern.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, my treatment's concluded. Let's resume
training.
choice_data_list: Take the rest of the day off just to be safe.
All right, but don't push yourself too hard.
All right, but don't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, my treatment's concluded. Let's resume
training.
choice_data_list: Take the rest of the day off just to be safe.
All right, but don't push yourself too hard.
All right, but don't push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Cooler heads prevail... is your implication, I
imagine?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I know very well just how frightening injuries can
be. Very well. I shall focus on recovering for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A slightly disappointed Mejiro Ardan returns to
the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Understood. I shall keep a close eye on my injury.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I wasn't expecting it... to hurt this much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...It appears I might have been rushing my
recovery. The prospect of my progress coming to
a halt was just too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Aggravating this injury further would be the worst
thing I could possibly do. ...I really should be
resting, shouldn't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A frustrated Mejiro Ardan trudges back to the
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Light calisthenics appear perfectly safe. ...This
much exercise will do for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What's more important than anything else is the
feeling that I'm making progress in spite of my
injury. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Mejiro Ardan
completes a light training session.
